name: Quick Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1/4 To 1/2 cup Cocoa, depending on how rich you want it
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in the bottom of a large saucepan.
2. Stir in confectioner's sugar, followed by all other ingredients.
3. Keep stirring until the mixture comes to a full boil.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square buttered pan.
5. Let cool and cut into small squares.
